commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e31c097fe7fdcc09c3938f89b04a095887a909cd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a compaction abort-controller registry and passes its signal into manual `/compact` so `abortEmbeddedAgentRun` can abort some in-progress compactions.

PR surface: Source +58. Total +58 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main starts manual `/compact` without an `abortSignal`, while the existing active-run and chat abort surfaces only see embedded/reply/chat run registries. I did not run a live long compaction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocker is the active-run ownership shape plus contributor real-behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor’s real setup proof and should not choose the permanent lifecycle contract alone.

target.title: fix(compact): make /compact command cancelable via abortEmbeddedAgentRun
target.body:
## Summary

修复 #66535: `/compact` 命令在执行中无法被取消的问题。

三处修改：
1. **`run-state.ts`**: 新增 `COMPACT_ABORT_CONTROLLERS` registry 及 `registerCompactionAbortController` / `unregisterCompactionAbortController` / `tryAbortCompaction` / `abortAllCompactionControllers` 辅助函数
2. **`runs.ts`**: `abortEmbeddedAgentRun` 在找不到活跃 run handle 时，fallback 检查 compaction abort controller；`mode:"compacting"` 和 `mode:"all"` 也遍历 compaction controllers
3. **`commands-compact.ts`**: 创建 `AbortController`，注册到 registry，通过 `abortSignal` 传给 `compactEmbeddedAgentSession`，完成后清理

## Test plan

- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-compact.test.ts` — 10/10 通过
- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/runs.test.ts` — 26/26 通过

Fixes: #66535

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: huangting-xy
